overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, holographic billboards, and futuristic architecture. The camera moves along a covered waterfront walkway before crossing a busy intersection with passing vehicles. The scene is clearly rendered game footage with high-quality lighting and detailed environmental design.

futuristic green military-style van parked by the curb
dark water canal running parallel to the walkway with city reflections

multiple neon signs and holographic displays on building facades
green metal safety railing along the water edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered waterfront walkway at night, with a dark canal on the left and futuristic buildings on the right. A large anime billboard is visible in the distance, and a green armored van is parked along the curb. The camera moves forward steadily, passing sparse pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with storefronts and holographic advertisements

events.description: exits covered walkway into open street section with exposed sky

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open sidewalk approaching the intersection, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: character in red dress with white hair walking toward the camera

entered.detail: building facade with bright pink neon signage and vertical light strips
large green holographic display or energy structure visible down the street

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into an open street section, revealing more of the night sky between towering buildings. The crowd density increases with more pedestrians walking along the sidewalk. A prominent pink neon storefront appears on the right, and a mysterious green glowing structure becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalks and vehicle traffic

events.description: turns right and steps onto crosswalk to cross the street
white futuristic car drives past from right to left through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while observing passing vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: white futuristic sedan with purple windows driving through the intersection

entered.detail: yellow and black striped crosswalk with red WAIT text painted on asphalt
sleek white vehicle with angular design and purple tinted windows
traffic signals and street lights at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right onto a crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes and red WAIT text, entering a wide intersection. A white futuristic car drives past as the camera crosses the street. The green armored van from earlier reappears in the distance as moving traffic, and the large anime billboard remains visible ahead, now centered in the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered waterfront path into the vibrant, open expanse of a neon-lit cyberpunk intersection. It begins on a covered walkway beside a dark canal, moving past a parked green armored van and sparse pedestrians toward a distant anime billboard. As the camera exits the cover, the scene opens up to reveal towering buildings against the night sky, with the crowd density increasing beside a glowing pink neon storefront. The perspective then shifts right onto a crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes and red text, entering a wide intersection as a white futuristic car drives past. Finally, the camera moves across the street toward the centered anime billboard while the green armored van reappears as part of the flowing city traffic.
